title: Butterball
description: If you have dry, sensitive or irritated skin, this is the bath bomb to replenish it.
ingredients: Theobroma Cacao Seed Butter (Fair Trade Organic Cocoa Butter)
Cananga Odorata Flower Oil (Ylang Ylang Oil)

images.alt: Butterball bath bomb. A smooth, ivory-white spherical bath bomb with a slightly textured surface. Small, buttery specks of cocoa butter are visible across the exterior. Standing alone against a plain light grey background.

An aerial view of a white, spherical Butterball bath bomb dissolving on the surface of clear, light blue water. The product fizzes, creating a thin layer of white foam and releasing small, visible flecks of cocoa butter across the bath.

An aerial view of the white, spherical Butterball bath bomb dissolving in light blue water. The product creates a layer of creamy, white foam on the surface, with visible small pieces of cocoa butter floating as it fizzes.
The white, spherical Butterball bath bomb sits on a plain, light gray background. The product features a matte, slightly textured surface with small, visible brown flecks of cocoa butter throughout.

An aerial view of a person with their head tilted back and eyes closed, soaking in a bath of light blue water. The surface is covered in a thick layer of creamy, white foam and visible cocoa butter flecks from the Butterball bath bomb.

collections: Bath Bombs and Bubble Bars for Kids
